evals.prompt: Generate ad creative for our Meta (Facebook/Instagram) campaign. We sell an AI writing assistant for content marketers. Main value prop: write blog posts 5x faster. Target audience: content marketing managers at B2B SaaS companies. Budget: $5k/month.
evals.expected_output: Should check for product-marketing-context.md first. Should generate creative following the angle-based approach: identify 3-5 angles (speed, quality, ROI, pain of blank page, competitive edge). For each angle, should generate primary text (≤125 chars), headline (≤40 chars), and description (≤30 chars) respecting Meta character limits. Should provide multiple variations per angle. Should suggest image/visual direction for each. Should organize output with angle name, hook, body, CTA for each variation.
assertions: Includes hook, body, and CTA for each
Recommends which angles to test first

evals.prompt: I need Google Ads copy for our CRM product. We're targeting the keyword 'best CRM for small business'. Need responsive search ads.
evals.expected_output: Should generate Google RSA creative respecting character limits: headlines (≤30 chars each, need 10-15 variations) and descriptions (≤90 chars each, need 4+ variations). Should note that pinning should be used sparingly as it reduces optimization. Should include the target keyword in headlines. Should provide multiple angle-based variations.
assertions: Respects Google RSA character limits (30 char headlines, 90 char descriptions)
Notes pinning should be used sparingly per skill guidance

evals.prompt: Here's our ad performance data: Ad A (pain point angle) - CTR 2.1%, CPC $3.20, Conv rate 4.5%. Ad B (social proof angle) - CTR 1.4%, CPC $4.10, Conv rate 6.2%. Ad C (feature angle) - CTR 0.8%, CPC $5.50, Conv rate 2.1%. Help me iterate on these.
evals.expected_output: Should activate the iteration-from-performance mode. Should analyze: Ad A has best CTR, Ad B has best conversion rate, Ad C is underperforming. Should recommend doubling down on pain point and social proof angles, pausing or reworking feature angle.
assertions: Activates iteration mode based on performance data
Analyzes CTR, CPC, and conversion rate for each ad
Identifies winning angles from the data
Recommends pausing or reworking underperforming creative
Generates new variations combining winning elements
